basic_details.job_title: IIT BHU Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology BHU (IIT BHU)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology BHU (IIT BHU) Research Associate Notification 2026 has been released on the official website https://www.iitbhu.ac.in/. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT BHU Research Associate Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years. Age relaxation is applicable for candidates belonging to scheduled castes/tribes/OBC, women, and physically handicapped candidates (as per GoI norms).

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. or Master Degree in Biochemical Engineering/Biotechnology/Microbiology/Environment Engineering/Botany or equivalent with at least 1 paper in SCI Journal
qualification.details: Ph.D. or Master Degree in Biochemical Engineering/Biotechnology/Microbiology/Environment Engineering/Botany or equivalent with at least 1 paper in SCI Journal.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 09-08-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

rows.indian_institute_of_technology_bhu_iit_b: Ph.D. or Master Degree in Biochemical Engineering/Biotechnology/Microbiology/Environment Engineering/Botany or equivalent with at least 1 paper in SCI Journal

content_sections.heading: IIT BHU Research Associate Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT BHU Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT BHU Research Associate Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT BHU Research Associate Vacancy Details 2026
IIT BHU Research Associate Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Ph.D. or Master Degree in Biochemical Engineering/Biotechnology/Microbiology/Environment Engineering/Botany or equivalent with at least 1 paper in SCI Journal.

content_sections.heading: IIT BHU Research Associate Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years. Age relaxation is applicable for candidates belonging to scheduled castes/tribes/OBC, women, and physically handicapped candidates (as per GoI norms).

content_sections.heading: IIT BHU Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
IIT BHU Research Associate Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 09-08-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT BHU Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT BHU Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Research Associate position at IIT BHU is 09 August 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Associate post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Ph.D. or Master Degree in Biochemical Engineering/Biotechnology/Microbiology/Environment Engineering/Botany or an equivalent field, with at least one paper published in an SCI Journal.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Research Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Research Associate position is 40 years. Age relaxation is provided for SC/ST, OBC, women, and physically handicapped candidates as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 65,500.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Research Associate position at IIT BHU?
faq.answer: Applications are accepted via email. You need to send your complete bio-data and required documents to the official email address mentioned in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The selection process will primarily involve an interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The position is contractual in nature.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIT BHU located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology BHU is located in Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, with the pincode 221005.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the "Important Links" section of this article by clicking on the provided link.
